CanonicalLoreRule: Dragons inhabit the world according to territorial instinct, age, elemental affinity, and individual will.

SpawnCategories.CanonicalRule: One lair equals one apex dragon territory.

TerritorialLaw.RuleText: Two apex dragons rarely tolerate the same territory.
Consequences: Dragon Lords avoid coexistence in overlapping subregions
Ancient Dragons will initiate combat over territory dominance when forced into proximity
Lesser Dragons (wyverns, drakes) may inhabit territory dominated by an Apex Dragon as subordinates

DragonHoardingLaw.RuleText: Dragons accumulate valuable objects within their lairs.
DragonHoardingLaw.LairTreatment: Treasure-rich apex encounter zones with high loot scaling factor.
